Uses of Package
com.example.battleship.controller.event

Packages that use com.example.battleship.controller.event
Package
Description
com.example.battleship.controller
 
com.example.battleship.controller.event
 
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.controller.event used by com.example.battleship.controller
    Class
    Description
    BoardListenerAdapter
    No-op default implementation of the model's BoardListener, following the same Adapter pattern as ShipPlacementAdapter and CombatAdapter.
    CombatListener
    Receives notifications about the combat phase (HU-2, HU-4): whose turn it is, and when the game ends.
    ShipPlacementListener
    Receives notifications about the fleet-placement phase (HU-1).
  • Classes in com.example.battleship.controller.event used by com.example.battleship.controller.event
    Class
    Description
    CombatListener
    Receives notifications about the combat phase (HU-2, HU-4): whose turn it is, and when the game ends.
    ShipPlacementListener
    Receives notifications about the fleet-placement phase (HU-1).
